PLUS the A.0-discovered orphan bug: applyCleanPoop SPLAT_STRUCTURE branch now requires primitives.has(fouledPrimId) — a gone-anchor splat takes the plain-delete branch (pre-fix: empty BFS deleted NOTHING incl. the poop -> main.ts orphan sweep re-dispatched CLEAN_POOP every tick forever + immortal floating splat). worldTypes fouledPrimitives doc rewritten (serialized + invariant). priorities.label: S79 P4 — HIGH-2 client sender-auth (session.hostPeerId TOFU latch + host-only message gate) + MEDIUM 3+player host-loss overlay + tests
priorities.check_method: S79 P4: NetSession.hostPeerId (null on host/pre-latch; cleared in teardownNet so a rejoin re-latches). hostAuthFilter (pure, exported) in clientHandlers: latch = roster-bearing LOBBY_PRESENCE/START_GAME_SIGNAL whose seat-0 entry NAMES THE SENDER (buildLobbyRoster/buildMatchRoster always put host selfId at seat 0) with first-NETSNAPSHOT fallback; gate = the 5 host-authored kinds drop unless sender===latched host, FAIL-CLOSED pre-latch; INTENT/HELLO unaffected. TOFU ceiling documented (no crypto identity until backlog #4). Closes: spoofed-snapshotSeq victim wedge, fake ENDGAME, START_GAME_SIGNAL seat hijack, bogus GODLY_TRIGGER. MEDIUM host-loss: main.ts connectionLost now ORs hostLost (= !isHost && latched && hostPeerId not in peerIds()) — closes the S62 KNOWN GAP 3+player limbo; host side keeps pure peerCount gate. BONUS REGRESSION FOUND+FIXED: nplayer 4p-FFA e2e (quarantine lane) failing since the S78 income cut — its WIN wait relied on natural accrual (complexity-3 = ~20s sim vs 20s timeout); fixed via host-score injection (S78 hunter.spec idiom); verified red->green locally. Multi-peer join flow THROUGH the gate validated live: nplayer 3/3 incl. 4-player FFA + lobby-presence (real WebRTC). GATES: tsc 0; vitest 1163/1163 (+6 hostAuthFilter tests); build 544.51KB <550; local playwright nplayer 3/3 + lobby-construction green. Commit c54b923 pushed.

priorities.label: S79 P5 — MEDIUM spawner-RNG serialization (StatefulRng + Spawner.getState/restoreState) + CREATURE_CHARGE drain-filter + tests
priorities.check_method: S79 P5: (1) rng.ts mulberry32 now returns StatefulRng (interface extends Rng; getState/setState on the single uint32 word t; the generated sequence is BYTE-IDENTICAL — vitest 1167 incl. save.replay byte-equality guards confirm zero perturbation). (2) Spawner.getState(): SpawnerState|null (null when an ENABLED stream is a custom non-stateful Rng — caller falls back to from-seed) capturing nextId + secondsUntilNextSpawn + 4 hazard countdowns (Infinity<->null for JSON-safety, null also = disabled stream) + 5 rng words; restoreState resumes bit-exactly (test proves a DIFFERENT-seed donor spawner reproduces all 5 output streams exactly after restore, 60s sim @5/s with every hazard firing — non-vacuous asserts). Wiring into WorldSnapshot deferred with the save/load UI (no main.ts save path exists; capability+tests close the audit MEDIUM 'restore() cannot resume'); logged carry-forward. (3) effectsRenderer: CREATURE_CHARGE added to the audio-only drain skip (BOND_FORMED/BOND_SEVERED) + defense no-op draw case; test asserts it no longer inflates activeCount. GATES: tsc 0; vitest 1167/1167 (62 files; +3 spawner +1 effects). Commit 347f725 pushed.

verification.needle: if (hitPrim !== null && (pid as number) >= (hitPrim as number)) continue;

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #balance-lever #seam-protected-tuning: WIN 50->150 + TIER 15->50 (audit-rec lever after the S78 income cut still left games short). Pre-verified EVERY e2e injects __TEST_WIN_SCORE__/score seams before touching the constant — the S78 hunter lesson applied PROACTIVELY this time. Zero test fallout (1149 green).

P2 #root-cause-the-feel-report #reuse-shipped-wire-state: user never saw the seagull -> root cause was ARITHMETIC not rendering (15-24 sparks at the LOCKED 0.15/s = 100-160s first gull vs ~2min S78 games); cadence 7/12 puts it in the opening minute. Pooped-building visual: A.0 discovered fouledPrimitives ALREADY rides NetSnapshot (worldTypes doc claimed host-only — stale), so the whole foul tint (prims+bonds) shipped with ZERO wire change/protocol bump. LESSON: probe the serializer before designing wire plumbing — the field you need may already ship.

P3 #derive-dont-patch #adjacent-bug-found-in-A0: instead of the audit-prescribed per-site fouledPrimitives.delete patches, ONE reconcile primitive (foul set := union of live splat-anchor components) at the two destroy choke points fixed the leak AND the un-cleanable income-0 sever case. A.0 line-by-line read also surfaced an UNREPORTED bug: orphan CLEAN_POOP no-oped forever (empty BFS deleted nothing incl. the poop -> infinite per-tick dispatch + immortal splat). LESSON: re-derive state from first principles at mutation boundaries beats patching every delete site; read the consumer loop (main.ts sweep) not just the reducer.

P4 #tofu-auth #one-primitive-two-fixes #quarantine-lane-blindspot: hostPeerId TOFU latch (roster seat-0-consistency anchor + NETSNAPSHOT fallback, fail-closed) closed backlog #2 client half; the SAME latch closed the S62 3+player host-loss limbo (hostLost overlay). Running the nplayer e2e to validate the gate exposed that the quarantined 4p-FFA test had been FAILING since the S78 income cut (natural-accrual WIN wait ~20s vs 20s timeout) — Rule 22 only watched the GATING lane. Fixed via score-injection (S78 hunter idiom). LESSON: after a balance-constant change, sweep the QUARANTINED lane too — a non-gating red is still a broken test.

P5 #serializable-rng #non-vacuous-roundtrip: mulberry32 -> StatefulRng (state = one uint32; sequence byte-identical, save.replay guards prove no perturbation). Spawner.getState/restoreState round-trips all 5 streams; the test seeds the donor spawner DIFFERENTLY so restore provably overrides seeds, and asserts every hazard actually fired in-window (non-vacuous). CREATURE_CHARGE joined the audio-only drain skip (S37 omission inflating activeCount).

P6 #doc-rot-sweep: 70-session-stale gameState header (primitive-count win), pre-S76 addScore docstring, as-7 cast made version-tracking via typeof, softReset hazard-teardown parity. Doc rot accumulates where the code outlives its header — sweep headers when the mechanic they describe is replaced.

P7 #vacuous-empty-result #in-context-beats-fleet-when-broke #audit-your-own-diff: the external 5-lens audit workflow burned 443K subagent tokens into the org spend limit — 5/5 reviewers ERRORED and the workflow returned {confirmed:[]}, which READS like a clean bill but is VACUOUS (zero reviewers ran). Re-ran the audit in-context by re-reading my own S79 diff adversarially: found 1 real semantic inconsistency I had introduced (destroy-only reconcile = foul set timing-dependent on placement; fixed at the two placement dispatch sites), 1 pre-existing gameplay bug (benched players silently wiping splats), 1 hot-path optimization (per-tick per-poop sort -> zero-alloc lowest-id, differential-tested), 1 idiom-consistency alloc fix. LESSONS: (a) an empty result from a FAILED pipeline is not a green result — check the failure channel before trusting the payload; (b) when fixing X-on-destroy, ask whether X-on-CREATE has the mirror problem (reconcile belonged at ALL topology mutations, not just deletes); (c) optimization claims of equivalence need DIFFERENTIAL tests that scramble the incidental order (Map insertion) the old code happened to neutralize.
session_status: S79 — 6/6 priorities shipped (9dcd284..3efcde9). USER SCOPE AMENDMENT (Rule 16, user-explicit): P7 sharpening/optimization pass — act on adversarial-audit findings + fix any bug found. In flight: CI gating E2E on 3efcde9, full local e2e suite, 5-lens audit workflow.
